PERF-232.description: Parallel work is fanned out from a loop without a concurrency bound such as errgroup.SetLimit or a semaphore. Unbounded fan-out can overwhelm CPU, memory, and pooled resources.
PERF-232.detection_notes: Match loop-contained errgroup.Go, go func, or WaitGroup fan-out when the enclosing function has no SetLimit or semaphore acquisition.
PERF-232.name: Unbounded Parallel Fan-Out
PERF-232.original_description: Detect unbounded per-item parallelism on bulk work paths

PERF-234.description: A bulk output buffer uses a large fixed Grow capacity or is taken from a pool, reset, and written without an estimated Grow. Prefer sizing from a known workload estimate when possible.
PERF-234.detection_notes: Match .Grow(N) with a large fixed integer literal (N>=4096), or Get().(*bytes.Buffer) plus Reset and Write without any Grow in the unit.
PERF-234.name: Bulk Buffer Without Workload Sizing
PERF-234.original_description: Detect fixed or absent capacity planning for bulk buffers

PERF-236.description: A signing helper clones an entire buffer before patching fixed-width fields. Prefer an owned writable buffer or in-place mutation when the caller already owns the data.
PERF-236.detection_notes: Match bytes.Clone inside functions whose name contains sign or signature.
PERF-236.name: Full Buffer Clone On Signing Path
PERF-236.original_description: Detect full-buffer copies in signature patching paths
